scripts.test: tsc --target ES2022 --module ESNext --moduleResolution Bundler --strict --skipLibCheck --esModuleInterop --allowSyntheticDefaultImports --rootDir . --outDir .tmp/tests --noEmit false tests/node-shims.d.ts tests/renderer.test.ts tests/desktop-pet-catalog.test.ts tests/desktop-sprite-layout.test.ts packages/pet-renderer/src/frameMath.ts packages/codex-pet-adapter/src/codexStates.ts packages/pet-protocol/src/types.ts apps/desktop/src/petCatalogModel.ts apps/desktop/src/spriteLayout.ts && esbuild tests/pet-package-intake.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=.tmp/tests/pet-package-intake.test.js && esbuild tests/imported-pet-transaction.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=.tmp/tests/imported-pet-transaction.test.js && esbuild tests/external-ai-bridge.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=.tmp/tests/external-ai-bridge.test.js && esbuild tests/external-event-resolver.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=.tmp/tests/external-event-resolver.test.js && node --test .tmp/tests/tests/renderer.test.js .tmp/tests/tests/desktop-pet-catalog.test.js .tmp/tests/tests/desktop-sprite-layout.test.js .tmp/tests/pet-package-intake.test.js .tmp/tests/imported-pet-transaction.test.js .tmp/tests/external-ai-bridge.test.js .tmp/tests/external-event-resolver.test.js && node --test tests/preferences.test.cjs
